prompt:
Scene:
A square fashion materials studio with a single fictional mannequin-like model pose repeated as a clean triptych, neutral background, soft side lighting, and precise garment detail.

Subject:
The same fictional model identity and pose appears three times. The garment silhouette remains identical, but the material changes across the triptych: matte wool, glossy technical nylon, and soft satin. Face, hair, body, skin tone, height, and pose must stay consistent.

Important details:
Photorealistic fabric behavior, clear material differences, stable model identity, identical silhouette, consistent camera height, subtle shadows, and a professional lookbook layout without readable labels.

Use case:
Independent virtual try-on study for testing material changes while preserving identity, pose, and garment silhouette.

Constraints:
Exactly three views, same fictional model identity, same garment silhouette, only material changes, no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted anatomy, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Material Swap Mannequin
description: The same fictional model and silhouette are shown with three different garment materials.

generation.runner_notes: Independent prompted image; no reference URL required.

en.title: Material Swap Mannequin
en.description: The same fictional model and silhouette are shown with three different garment materials.

zh-CN.title: 材质替换模特
zh-CN.description: 同一虚构模特和同一服装轮廓展示三种不同面料。

alt.en: A triptych showing the same fictional model with the same outfit in three materials.
alt.zh-CN: 三联图展示同一虚构模特穿同一轮廓的三种材质服装。
